parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor ":读者" as reader
actor ":图书管理员" as admin
participant "还书界面" as interface
participant ":还书信息" as info
participant ":系统" as system

loop
    activate reader
    reader -> admin : 1.取消预定
    activate admin
    admin -> interface : 2.处理图书
    activate interface
    interface -> info : 3.获取图书信息
    activate info
    info -> interface : 4.图书信息
    deactivate info
    deactivate interface
    
    activate interface
    interface -> system : 5.删除预定记录
    activate system
    system -> system : 6.删除预定记录
    system -> interface : 7.删除预定成功
    deactivate system
    interface -> admin : 8.处理图成功
    deactivate interface
    admin -> reader : 9.取消预定成功
    deactivate admin
    deactivate reader
end
@enduml
```
